message:
fix(content): handle nested array content in coerceContent/coerceRawContent

Bug fix: Both cass.ts and diary.ts coerceContent functions failed to recurse
when an object had a `content` property that was an array. This caused parsing
failures for Claude's multi-block message format when nested in objects.

Also includes:
- Optimize context sorting: consolidate sort in scoreBulletsEnhanced with
  relevanceScore tie-breaker, removing redundant re-sort
- Add serve input validation: reject empty task/query strings
- Add context ordering tests: verify bullets sorted by relevance
- Update validate tests: use proper delta type constructors

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
